english_gloss: to fall in love, to be in love

sentences.note: He fell in love with the city
It doesn't make sense to marry without being in love
There was a man in love with his daughter

recall_prompts.prompt: Birini çok sevdin ve onun için hissiyat taşıyorsun. Ne oldu?
O kız senin kalbini çalmış. Sen ne olmuşsun?
